verses.latin_vulgate: In te, Domine, speravi ;  non confundar in æternum :  in justitia tua libera me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּךָֽ־יְהֹוָ֣ה חָ֭סִיתִי אַל־אֵב֣וֹשָׁה לְעוֹלָ֑ם בְּצִדְקָתְךָ֥ פַלְּטֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: In thee, O Lord, have I hoped, let me never be confounded: deliver me in thy justice.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi edelläveisaajalle. (H31:2) Herra, sinuun minä uskallan, etten minä ikänä häpiään tulisi: vapahda minua sinun vanhurskautes kautta.
verses.king_james: In thee, O Lord, do I put my trust; let me never be ashamed: deliver me in thy righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inclina ad me aurem tuam ;  accelera ut eruas me.  Esto mihi in Deum protectorem,  et in domum refugii, ut salvum me facias :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַטֵּ֤ה אֵלַ֨י ׀ אׇזְנְךָ֮ מְהֵרָ֢ה הַצִּ֫ילֵ֥נִי הֱיֵ֤ה לִ֨י ׀ לְֽצוּר־מָ֭עוֹז לְבֵ֥ית מְצוּד֗וֹת לְהוֹשִׁיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Bow down thy ear to me: make haste to deliver me. Be thou unto me a God, a protector, and a house of refuge, to save me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kallista korvas minun puoleeni, auta minua äkisti: ole minulle vahva kallio ja linna minua auttamaan;
verses.king_james: Bow down thine ear to me; deliver me speedily: be thou my strong rock, for an house of defence to save me.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam fortitudo mea et refugium meum es tu ;  et propter nomen tuum deduces me et enutries me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־סַלְעִ֣י וּמְצוּדָתִ֣י אָ֑תָּה וּלְמַ֥עַן שִׁ֝מְךָ֗ תַּֽנְחֵ֥נִי וּֽתְנַהֲלֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thou art my strength and my refuge; and for thy name's sake thou wilt lead me, and nourish me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinä olet minun kallioni ja minun linnani, ettäs siis sinun nimes tähden minua taluttaisit ja veisit;
verses.king_james: For thou art my rock and my fortress; therefore for thy name’s sake lead me, and guide me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Educes me de laqueo hoc quem absconderunt mihi,  quoniam tu es protector meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹצִיאֵ֗נִי מֵרֶ֣שֶׁת ז֭וּ טָ֣מְנוּ לִ֑י כִּי־אַ֝תָּ֗ה מָעוּזִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou wilt bring me out of this snare, which they have hidden for me: for thou art my protector.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettäs minun kirvottaisit verkosta, jonka he minun eteeni virittivät; sillä sinä olet minun väkevyyteni.
verses.king_james: Pull me out of the net that they have laid privily for me: for thou art my strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: In manus tuas commendo spiritum meum ;  redemisti me, Domine Deus veritatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּיָדְךָ֮ אַפְקִ֢יד ר֫וּחִ֥י פָּדִ֖יתָ אוֹתִ֥י יְהֹוָ֗ה אֵ֣ל אֱמֶֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Into thy hands I commend my spirit: thou hast redeemed me, O Lord, the God of truth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun käsiis annan minä henkeni, sinä olet minun lunastanut, Herra, sinä totinen Jumala.
verses.king_james: Into thine hand I commit my spirit: thou hast redeemed me, O Lord God of truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Odisti observantes vanitates supervacue ;  ego autem in Domino speravi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׂנֵ֗אתִי הַשֹּׁמְרִ֥ים הַבְלֵי־שָׁ֑וְא וַ֝אֲנִ֗י אֶל־יְהֹוָ֥ה בָּטָֽחְתִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast hated them that regard vanities, to no purpose. But I have hoped in the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä vihaan niitä, jotka pitävät väärää oppia; mutta minä uskallan Herraan.
verses.king_james: I have hated them that regard lying vanities: but I trust in the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsultabo, et lætabor in misericordia tua,  quoniam respexisti humilitatem meam ;  salvasti de necessitatibus animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָגִ֥ילָה וְאֶשְׂמְחָ֗ה בְּחַ֫סְדֶּ֥ךָ אֲשֶׁ֣ר רָ֭אִיתָ אֶת־עׇנְיִ֑י יָ֝דַ֗עְתָּ בְּצָר֥וֹת נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will be glad and rejoice in thy mercy. For thou hast regarded my humility, thou hast saved my soul out of distresses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä ihastun ja riemuitsen sinun hyvyytes tähden, ettäs katsot minun raadollisuuttani, ja tunnet minun sieluni tuskassa.
verses.king_james: I will be glad and rejoice in thy mercy: for thou hast considered my trouble; thou hast known my soul in adversities;

verses.latin_vulgate: Nec conclusisti me in manibus inimici :  statuisti in loco spatioso pedes meos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֣א הִ֭סְגַּרְתַּנִי בְּיַד־אוֹיֵ֑ב הֶעֱמַ֖דְתָּ בַמֶּרְחָ֣ב רַגְלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou hast not shut me up in the hands of the enemy: thou hast set my feet in a spacious place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja et sinä sulje minua vihollisteni käsiin: sinä asetat minun avaraan paikkaan.
verses.king_james: And hast not shut me up into the hand of the enemy: thou hast set my feet in a large room.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miserere mei, Domine, quoniam tribulor ;  conturbatus est in ira oculus meus, anima mea, et venter meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חׇנֵּ֥נִי יְהֹוָה֮ כִּ֤י צַ֫ר־לִ֥י עָשְׁשָׁ֖ה בְכַ֥עַס עֵינִ֗י נַפְשִׁ֥י וּבִטְנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Have mercy on me, O Lord, for I am afflicted: my eye is troubled with wrath, my soul, and my belly:
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, ole minulle armollinen, sillä minä ahdistetaan; minun kasvoni ovat muuttuneet murheesta, niin myös minun sieluni ja vatsani.
verses.king_james: Have mercy upon me, O Lord, for I am in trouble: mine eye is consumed with grief, yea, my soul and my belly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam defecit in dolore vita mea,  et anni mei in gemitibus.  Infirmata est in paupertate virtus mea,  et ossa mea conturbata sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י כָל֪וּ בְיָג֡וֹן חַיַּי֮ וּשְׁנוֹתַ֢י בַּאֲנָ֫חָ֥ה כָּשַׁ֣ל בַּעֲוֺנִ֣י כֹחִ֑י וַעֲצָמַ֥י עָשֵֽׁשׁוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For my life is wasted with grief: and my years in sighs. My strength is weakened through poverty and my bones are disturbed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minun elämäni on kulutettu murheesta, ja minun vuoteni huokauksesta: minun voimani on rauvennut pahain tekoin kautta, ja minun luuni ovat muserretut.
verses.king_james: For my life is spent with grief, and my years with sighing: my strength faileth because of mine iniquity, and my bones are consumed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super omnes inimicos meos factus sum opprobrium,  et vicinis meis valde, et timor notis meis ;  qui videbant me foras fugerunt a me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִכׇּל־צֹרְרַ֨י הָיִ֪יתִי חֶרְפָּ֡ה וְלִ֥שְׁכֵנַ֨י ׀ מְאֹד֮ וּפַ֢חַד לִֽמְיֻדָּ֫עָ֥י רֹאַ֥י בַּח֑וּץ נָדְד֥וּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I am become a reproach among all my enemies, and very much to my neighbours; and a fear to my acquaintances. They that saw me without fled from me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen pilkaksi tullut kaikille vihamiehilleni ja kylällisilleni ylönpalttisesti, ja hämmästykseksi tuttavilleni: jotka minun ulkona näkevät, pakenevat minua.
verses.king_james: I was a reproach among all mine enemies, but especially among my neighbours, and a fear to mine acquaintance: they that did see me without fled from me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oblivioni datus sum, tamquam mortuus a corde ;  factus sum tamquam vas perditum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִ֭שְׁכַּחְתִּי כְּמֵ֣ת מִלֵּ֑ב הָ֝יִ֗יתִי כִּכְלִ֥י אֹבֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: I am forgotten as one dead from the heart. I am become as a vessel that is destroyed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen sydämestä unhotettu niinkuin kuollut: minä olen niinkuin rikottu astia.
verses.king_james: I am forgotten as a dead man out of mind: I am like a broken vessel.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam audivi vituperationem multorum commorantium in circuitu.  In eo dum convenirent simul adversum me,  accipere animam meam consiliati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י שָׁמַ֨עְתִּי ׀ דִּבַּ֥ת רַבִּים֮ מָג֢וֹר מִסָּ֫בִ֥יב בְּהִוָּסְדָ֣ם יַ֣חַד עָלַ֑י לָקַ֖חַת נַפְשִׁ֣י זָמָֽמוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I have heard the blame of many that dwell round about. While they assembled together against me, they consulted to take away my life.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä kuulen monen häväistyksen, että jokainen karttaa minua: he pitävät keskenänsä neuvoa minusta, ja tahtovat ottaa minun henkeni.
verses.king_james: For I have heard the slander of many: fear was on every side: while they took counsel together against me, they devised to take away my life.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem in te speravi, Domine ;  dixi : Deus meus es tu ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ עָלֶ֣יךָ בָטַ֣חְתִּי יְהֹוָ֑ה אָ֝מַ֗רְתִּי אֱלֹהַ֥י אָֽתָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I have put my trust in thee, O Lord: I said: Thou art my God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä toivon sinuun, Herra, ja sanon: sinä olet minun Jumalani!
verses.king_james: But I trusted in thee, O Lord: I said, Thou art my God.

verses.latin_vulgate: in manibus tuis sortes meæ :  eripe me de manu inimicorum meorum, et a persequentibus me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּיָדְךָ֥ עִתֹּתָ֑י הַצִּ֘ילֵ֤נִי מִיַּד־א֝וֹיְבַ֗י וּמֵֽרֹדְפָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: My lots are in thy hands. Deliver me out of the hands of my enemies; and from them that persecute me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun aikani ovat sinun käsissäs: pelasta minua vihollisteni kädestä ja niistä, jotka minua vainoovat.
verses.king_james: My times are in thy hand: deliver me from the hand of mine enemies, and from them that persecute me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Illustra faciem tuam super servum tuum ;  salvum me fac in misericordia tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָאִ֣ירָה פָ֭נֶיךָ עַל־עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ ה֖וֹשִׁיעֵ֣נִי בְחַסְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Make thy face to shine upon thy servant; save me in thy mercy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Anna kasvos paistaa palvelias päälle: auta minua laupiutes kautta.
verses.king_james: Make thy face to shine upon thy servant: save me for thy mercies’ sake.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, non confundar, quoniam invocavi te.  Erubescant impii, et deducantur in infernum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה אַל־אֵ֭בוֹשָׁה כִּ֣י קְרָאתִ֑יךָ יֵבֹ֥שׁוּ רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יִדְּמ֥וּ לִשְׁאֽוֹל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let me not be confounded, O Lord, for I have called upon thee. Let the wicked be ashamed, and be brought down to hell.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, älä minun anna häpiään tulla; sillä sinua minä avuksi huudan: jumalattomat tulkoon häpiään, vaijetkoon helvetissä.
verses.king_james: Let me not be ashamed, O Lord; for I have called upon thee: let the wicked be ashamed, and let them be silent in the grave.

verses.latin_vulgate: muta fiant labia dolosa,  quæ loquuntur adversus justum iniquitatem,  in superbia, et in abusione.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֵּ֥אָלַ֗מְנָה שִׂפְתֵ֫י־שָׁ֥קֶר הַדֹּבְר֖וֹת עַל־צַדִּ֥יק עָתָ֗ק בְּגַאֲוָ֥ה וָבֽוּז׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let deceitful lips be made dumb. Which speak iniquity against the just, with pride and abuse.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tulkoon mykäksi väärät suut, jotka puhuvat vanhurskasta vastaan kovasti ylpeydestä ja ylönkatseesta.
verses.king_james: Let the lying lips be put to silence; which speak grievous things proudly and contemptuously against the righteous.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quam magna multitudo dulcedinis tuæ, Domine,  quam abscondisti timentibus te ;  perfecisti eis qui sperant in te in conspectu filiorum hominum !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מָ֤ה רַֽב־טוּבְךָ֮ אֲשֶׁר־צָפַ֢נְתָּ לִּירֵ֫אֶ֥יךָ פָּ֭עַלְתָּ לַחֹסִ֣ים בָּ֑ךְ נֶ֝֗גֶד בְּנֵ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: O how great is the multitude of thy sweetness, O Lord, which thou hast hidden for them that fear thee! Which thou hast wrought for them that hope in thee, in the sight of the sons of men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuinka suuri on sinun hyvyytes, jonka panit tallelle niille, jotka sinua pelkäävät! ja jonka niille osoitat, jotka sinuun uskaltavat, ihmisten lasten edessä!
verses.king_james: Oh how great is thy goodness, which thou hast laid up for them that fear thee; which thou hast wrought for them that trust in thee before the sons of men!

verses.latin_vulgate: Abscondes eos in abscondito faciei tuæ a conturbatione hominum ;  proteges eos in tabernaculo tuo, a contradictione linguarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּסְתִּירֵ֤ם ׀ בְּסֵ֥תֶר פָּנֶיךָ֮ מֵרֻכְסֵ֫י־אִ֥ישׁ תִּצְפְּנֵ֥ם בְּסֻכָּ֗ה מֵרִ֥יב לְשֹׁנֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou shalt hide them in the secret of thy face, from the disturbance of men. Thou shalt protect them in thy tabernacle from the contradiction of tongues.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä kätket heitä tykönäs salaisesti jokaisen haastosta: sinä peität heitä majassas riiteleväisistä kielistä.
verses.king_james: Thou shalt hide them in the secret of thy presence from the pride of man: thou shalt keep them secretly in a pavilion from the strife of tongues.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus,  quoniam mirificavit misericordiam suam mihi in civitate munita.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּר֥וּךְ יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּ֥י הִפְלִ֘יא־חַסְדּ֥וֹ לִ֝֗י בְּעִ֣יר מָצֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the Lord, for he hath shewn his wonderful mercy to me in a fortified city.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra olkoon kiitetty, että hän on minulle osoittanut ihmeellisen hyvyyden, vahvassa kaupungissa.
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord: for he hath shewed me his marvellous kindness in a strong city.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem dixi in excessu mentis meæ :  Projectus sum a facie oculorum tuorum :  ideo exaudisti vocem orationis meæ, dum clamarem ad te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ אָ֘מַ֤רְתִּי בְחׇפְזִ֗י נִגְרַזְתִּי֮ מִנֶּ֢גֶד עֵ֫ינֶ֥יךָ אָכֵ֗ן שָׁ֭מַעְתָּ ק֥וֹל תַּחֲנוּנַ֗י בְּשַׁוְּעִ֥י אֵלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I said in the excess of my mind: I am cast away from before thy eyes. Therefore thou hast heard the voice of my prayer, when I cried to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä sanoin pikaisuudessani: minä olen sinun silmäis edestä sysätty pois: kuitenkin kuulit sinä rukoukseni äänen, koska minä sinun tykös huusin.
verses.king_james: For I said in my haste, I am cut off from before thine eyes: nevertheless thou heardest the voice of my supplications when I cried unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Diligite Dominum, omnes sancti ejus,  quoniam veritatem requiret Dominus,  et retribuet abundanter facientibus superbiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶ֥הֱב֥וּ אֶֽת־יְהֹוָ֗ה כׇּֽל־חֲסִ֫ידָ֥יו אֱ֭מוּנִים נֹצֵ֣ר יְהֹוָ֑ה וּמְשַׁלֵּ֥ם עַל־יֶ֝֗תֶר עֹשֵׂ֥ה גַאֲוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: O love the Lord, all ye his saints: for the Lord will require truth, and will repay them abundantly that act proudly.
verses.finnish_biblia: Rakastakaat Herraa, kaikki hänen pyhänsä; Herra varjelee uskollisia ja runsaasti kostaa niille, jotka ylpeyttä harjoittelevat.
verses.king_james: O love the Lord, all ye his saints: for the Lord preserveth the faithful, and plentifully rewardeth the proud doer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viriliter agite, et confortetur cor vestrum,  omnes qui speratis in Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חִ֭זְקוּ וְיַאֲמֵ֣ץ לְבַבְכֶ֑ם כׇּל־הַ֝מְיַחֲלִ֗ים לַֽיהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Do ye manfully, and let your heart be strengthened, all ye that hope in the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Olkaat hyvässä turvassa, ja hän vahvistaa teidän sydämenne, kaikki jotka Herraa odotatte.
verses.king_james: Be of good courage, and he shall strengthen your heart, all ye that hope in the Lord.
